description: ICE card in the 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' template. The full-bleed background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up photograph of a person's hand cuffed in steel handcuffs, with the open palm facing up and the cuff and chain on the right. Over a darkened black overlay on the left, the headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' is set in bold pale cyan serif capitals at top, with a subhead in white sans-serif reading '1/26/2025 | Dallas, TX'. Below, the name 'Cesar Mendoza Gonzalez' appears in large bold white sans-serif, followed by 'CRIME:' and a bullet 'Possession of a controlled substance.' The white DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark sit in the lower-left corner. A diagonal red banner in the lower-right reads 'DALLAS'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | Dallas, TX; Cesar Mendoza Gonzalez; CRIME: Possession of a controlled substance; ICE; DALLAS
